steps.title: Separate the series items
steps.content: The Law of Piety established three things: the sanctity of animal life, the just treatment of the elderly, and the abolition of the slave trade. The blank falls after the first item in that series.

steps.title: Reject wrong list marks
steps.content: A omits the punctuation needed between list items. B uses a semicolon even though the rest of the series uses commas. C uses a colon, which introduces material instead of separating list items. A comma correctly separates the first item. The answer is D.
